mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_name, medicine_id, medicine_name, quantity, pharmacist_name, dispensed_at FROM medicine_dispenses ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medicine_dispenses (patient_name, medicine_id, medicine_name, quantity, pharmacist_name) VALUES (#{patientName}, #{medicineId}, #{medicineName}, #{quantity}, #{pharmacistName})
mapper.update: UPDATE medicine_dispenses SET pharmacist_name = #{pharmacistName}, dispensed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
